goal: Rewrite README.md from scratch as a marketing-quality technical document with Mermaid pipeline diagram (worked example), inline research citations, agent framework competitor comparison, multi-platform support highlight, and image placeholders for CEO to capture later.

risks: Competitor research quality: Need accurate data on Manus and other agent frameworks for comparison table. Mitigation: Taylor has WebSearch/WebFetch tools for research.
250-350 line target vs depth: Pipeline worked example, competitor table, research citations, agent team, multi-platform — all within budget. Mitigation: collapsible sections for depth.
Research citation accuracy: Paper URLs must be correct or credibility is undermined. Mitigation: citations already in .context/design/ docs, plus Taylor can verify URLs via web search.
over_engineering_flags: Single-file rewrite. One project, one builder, one reviewer. No multi-project needed.
No code changes, no tests, no architecture. Content work: Taylor builds, Priya reviews.

projects.title: README.md Complete Rewrite — Marketing-Quality Technical Document
projects.scope_summary: Rewrite README.md from scratch with: (1) hero section with value prop and image placeholder, (2) Mermaid pipeline diagram with worked example showing a directive flowing through 15 steps, (3) research-grounded pipeline explanation with inline citations, (4) agent framework competitor comparison table (CrewAI, AutoGen, Devin, Manus — research needed), (5) multi-platform support section, (6) 'Meet Your Team' agent table, (7) game UI as visual hook not headline, (8) collapsible sections for depth. Target 250-350 visible lines. No marketing superlatives. Image placeholders for CEO.
